description.overview: An old Dutch breed known for their versatility and gentle nature. They're excellent family dogs who also perform well in the field.
description.history: The Drentse Patrijshond originated in Netherlands.
description.temperament: Known for being loyal, intelligent, sensitive.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their medium-length, dense, slightly wavy coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: An old Dutch breed known for their versatility and gentle nature. They're excellent family dogs who also perform well in the field.
